headline: A Look At Analog Devices (ADI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Analog Devices: Event Driven Snapshot Analog Devices (ADI) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock down about 13% over the past month but up roughly 12% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Analog Devices. Against this backdrop, Analog Devices shows fading near term momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 12.84% decline, while longer term performance remains stronger, highlighted by a 1 year total shareholder return of 47.95%.
